text-block-1.title: Testing in the Construct
text-block-1.text:
Just as Morpheus trained Neo in the Construct - a safe simulation environment - we use unit testing to verify our OSGi components work correctly before deploying them to production.

OSGi Mocks and JUnit provide the testing framework to simulate the OSGi environment without requiring a full runtime.

code-block-1.title: OSGi Mock Unit Test

text-block-2.title: Testing Best Practices
text-block-2.text:
• Use OSGi Mocks to simulate the OSGi runtime
  • Test component activation and configuration
  • Verify service dependencies are properly injected
  • Test lifecycle methods (@Activate, @Deactivate, @Modified)
  • Mock external dependencies for isolated testing
